name: raycast-raindrop
title: Raindrop.io
description: Search, browse, and manage your Raindrop.io bookmarks directly from Raycast
author: jae-jae

commands.name: search-bookmarks
commands.title: Search Bookmarks
commands.description: Search and open your Raindrop.io bookmarks

commands.name: browse-collections
commands.title: Browse Collections
commands.description: Browse your Raindrop.io collections and nested bookmarks

commands.name: add-bookmark
commands.title: Add Bookmark
commands.description: Quickly add a new bookmark to Raindrop.io

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: API Token
preferences.description: Your Raindrop.io test token from Settings → Integrations → For developers

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and revisit the \`package.json\` file to make sure it points to the correct npm package.

If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use the \`npm run publish\` command instead.

" && exit 1
